docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY LI, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, FRANCIS D.B.A. CLAIRE'S VALET CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED MAY-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, FRANCIS D.B.A. CLAIRE'S VALET CLEANERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, GRACE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOY, FRANCIS D.B.A. CLAIRE'S VALET CLEANERS $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
